heading: Your jobs for today
subheading: We found these jobs for you. Request an analysis via WhatsApp.
invalidDescription: This jobs link is no longer valid. Go back to WhatsApp to get a new one.
renewDescription: Your subscription expired, so we couldn't analyze the job. Renew to use analyses again.
loginRequiredDescription: Sign in to access your full account without changing this jobs page.
sameAccountDescription: You are already using the account associated with this digest.
switchAccountTitle: This digest belongs to another account
switchAccountDescription: The account changes only after you confirm. Your current session will not be ended automatically.
switchAccountError: We could not end the current session. Please try again.
